title: Pan Aroma Mini Gel Air Freshener, 9 Pack, Assorted Scents (Lavender Garden/Vanilla Bean/Pure Cotton)
features: TRIPLE PACK: Contains 3 mini gel air fresheners with different fragrances - Mediterranean Orchard, Cashmere & Apricot, and Pink Orchid for varied home ambiance
ESSENTIAL OILS: Each air freshener is infused with essential oils to create long-lasting, authentic fragrances that enhance your living space
COMPACT DESIGN: Mini gel format makes these air fresheners perfect for small spaces whilst providing effective room fragrance coverage
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for bathrooms, wardrobes, cars, offices and other enclosed spaces where lasting freshness is desired
CONTINUOUS FRESHNESS: Gel formula gradually releases fragrance over time, ensuring consistent scent delivery throughout product use
description: Product description Transform your living space with Pan Aroma's Mini Gel Air Fresheners, a delightful trio of fragrances that bring nature's finest scents into your home. This pack includes three distinct aromas: Mediterranean Orchard with its fresh citrus notes, Cashmere & Apricot offering a warm, sophisticated blend, and Pink Orchid delivering an exotic floral fragrance. Each compact gel freshener contains essential oils for a more authentic aromatic experience. The innovative gel formula provides consistent fragrance release, making these ideal for bathrooms, wardrobes, or any small space requiring a pleasant atmosphere. Their convenient mini size allows for discreet placement while maintaining effective room freshening capabilities. The domed design not only looks elegant but also helps optimise fragrance distribution. Perfect for those seeking variety in their home fragrancing solutions, this set lets you alternate between scents or use them in different rooms simultaneously. Ingredients Water
